base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of structures — a tile from 1989 populous. Settlement buildings — hut/house/tower/castle at 4 tier-upgrades × good + evil palette variants. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Settlement buildings — hut/house/tower/castle at 4 tier-upgrades × good + evil palette variants
